headline: Lockheed Martin Introduces PAC-3 ACE™ - A High-Performance, Low-Cost Interceptor
summary: Lockheed Martin (NYSE: LMT) today announced the introduction of the PAC-3® Adapted Capability Effector (PAC-3 ACE™), a low-cost interceptor built to defeat a wide range of air and missile threats for less than half the cost of a PAC-3 MSE per unit.

content.title: Lockheed Martin Introduces PAC-3 ACE™ - A High-Performance, Low-Cost Interceptor
content.summary: Lockheed Martin (NYSE: LMT) today announced the introduction of the PAC-3® Adapted Capability Effector (PAC-3 ACE™), a low-cost interceptor built to defeat a wide range of air and missile threats for less than half the cost of a PAC-3 MSE per unit.

thumbnail.caption: A rendering of Lockheed Martin’s PAC-3 ACE interceptor.

headline: Lockheed Martin Unveils MORFIUS™ X-Rotor: The New Drone‑Killer Set to Power America's Fight Against Swarms
summary: Commercial swarms of hostile drones are fast becoming the biggest threat to allied forces on today's battlefields. Enter MORFIUS™ X-Rotor — Lockheed Martin's newly released "one‑to‑many" airborne High Power Microwave (HPM), counter‑drone system that can neutralize more than 50 enemy drones in a single flight.

content.title: Lockheed Martin Unveils MORFIUS™ X-Rotor: The New Drone‑Killer Set to Power America's Fight Against Swarms
content.summary: Commercial swarms of hostile drones are fast becoming the biggest threat to allied forces on today's battlefields. Enter MORFIUS™ X-Rotor — Lockheed Martin's newly released "one‑to‑many" airborne High Power Microwave (HPM), counter‑drone system that can neutralize more than 50 enemy drones in a single flight.

thumbnail.caption: MORFIUS X-Rotor keeps a significantly low cost per kill, protecting defense budgets while maintaining relentless firepower.

headline: LMT Stock Gains Premarket: Lockheed Martin Reveals New Counter-Drone Weapon, Cheaper Missile Interceptor
summary: Lockheed Martin launched new counter-drone and missile systems, including MORFIUS X-Rotor and PAC-3 ACE.

content.title: LMT Stock Gains Premarket: Lockheed Martin Reveals New Counter-Drone Weapon, Cheaper Missile Interceptor
content.summary: Lockheed Martin launched new counter-drone and missile systems, including MORFIUS X-Rotor and PAC-3 ACE.

headline: Lockheed Martin unveils lower-cost Patriot ACE interceptor as global air defence demand accelerates
summary: Lockheed Martin (NYSE:LMT) has introduced a lower-cost Patriot interceptor designed to help armed forces strengthen air-defence capabilities while reducing procurement costs, as governments seek affordable solutions to counter drones and missile threats. The company said its new PAC-3 Adapted Capability Effector (ACE) interceptor is expected to cost less than half the price of its existing PAC-3 MSE missile, which is estimated at around $4 million per interceptor according to U.

content.title: Lockheed Martin unveils lower-cost Patriot ACE interceptor as global air defence demand accelerates
content.summary: Lockheed Martin (NYSE:LMT) has introduced a lower-cost Patriot interceptor designed to help armed forces strengthen air-defence capabilities while reducing procurement costs, as governments seek affordable solutions to counter drones and missile threats. The company said its new PAC-3 Adapted Capability Effector (ACE) interceptor is expected to cost less than half the price of its existing PAC-3 MSE missile, which is estimated at around $4 million per interceptor according to U.
